标题: The North Face 86L detachable sleeve design dual-purpose down jacket/vest is a versatile winter fashion essential. The detachable sleeves allow you to switch between a down jacket and a down vest, combining warmth and style effortlessly. Filled with 90% white duck down, it provides warmth without bulkiness. The new environmentally friendly fabric has a metallic texture that is smooth and windproof, waterproof, and has a three-dimensional feel. Available in four colors: bright black, liquid silver, khaki, and orange. Sizes: S-M-L.

The North Face introduces the Antarctica Parka series, a cold-resistant jacket designed for polar exploration. It features a 14d high-strength nylon outer material with GORE-TEX membrane, filled with light electronic down for excellent warmth. The jacket is thick and durable, with high tear resistance Partex Quantum lining for waterproof and breathable properties. It has a detachable fur collar and five zippered pockets for storing small items. Available in unisex sizes S-XXL, this outdoor climbing series is exceptionally thick and warm.

GUCCI x The North Face collaboration, mid-length fully taped down jacket. Another key piece from the fully taped down series. Filled with 90% white duck down, featuring high-density windproof fabric for the outer layer, with a fine and tight weave. The inner filling is premium 90% white duck down, evenly delicate and fluffy, providing ample warmth while feeling lightweight and comfortable on the body. Loose and casual silhouette with great coverage and warmth, like walking around in a big cozy blanket. The inner lining is treated to prevent down leakage, ensuring long-lasting companionship.

The North Face's new avant-garde design mid-length down jacket with a hood, featuring original custom windproof and rain-resistant fabric, filled with 700-fill power white goose down, shoulder color-blocking design adds a touch of fashion, adjustable hem design for a perfect fit for all body types, high version, unisex. Sizes available: S - L.

TNF North Face 22S latest Ken Bean matching short down jacket, featuring original custom waterproof nylon fabric, filled with 90% white duck down, with German imported machine embroidered logo on the chest and back. The ultra-short design enhances leg length, providing warmth and a stylish look. This down jacket is highly popular even before the release of images! High quality version, available in sizes S, M, L.

Equipped with seamless YKK zipper for a perfect fit. Aerospace-grade, part of TheNorthFace Summit Series, this 3-in-1 down jacket is the ultimate duck down jacket for wind and rain protection, durability, and versatility. Colors available: black, navy blue, gray. Sizes: S-3XL.

TNF North Face 22S Shen Min'er matching workwear down jacket. This style has sold out even before the images were released. Made with original custom waterproof fabric, filled with 90% white duck down for high loft and excellent resilience. This jacket is fully filled with down, including the hood and collar, providing excellent warmth. The oversized pockets at the hem are stylish and practical, and the half-glove design on the sleeves enhances warmth. High version, unisex, available in sizes XS-XXL.

THE NORTH FACE Patchwork Color Card: Wheat-Mocha Brown-White-Green-Blue-Burgundy. Fabric: Utilizes genuine fabric from the same supplier as the authentic product, featuring fine grid nylon fabric with no down leakage, providing the same lightweight and warmth. Down: National standard 90% white duck down, ensuring optimal fluffiness to keep the down close to the skin for maximum warmth retention. Craftsmanship: Utilizes segmented filling process to prevent down from shifting in the lightweight fabric. Embroidery: Utilizes imported Tajima embroidery technology for classic logo embroidery on the front and back, enhancing visual depth. Look for the white 700D fluffiness at the lower right hem. ⚠️ The hood at the back collar can be tucked away when not in use, and the garment can be folded into a small pouch that fits into the pocket for added versatility.
THE NORTH FACE color-blocked design, detailed inner lining, authentic with all three tags - anti-counterfeiting can be verified by scanning the code.

The North Face Kids' 1996 Down Jacket features high-fill power down for visible warmth. It uses clean large duck down filling with a high down content, making it lightweight and providing excellent warmth retention. The original soft and comfortable fabric ensures a light and warm feel, with good wrinkle resistance and a pleasant touch on the skin.
THE NORTH FACE Kids' 1996 Nuptse Jacket - Premium 80% Down Version - Seven Colors Available: Wheat, Burgundy, White, Black, Dirty Pink, Pink, Mustard Green. Sizes: 110-120-130-140-150-160. In stock.

Comparison of details of THE NORTH FACE Kids' 1996 Down Jacket; According to regulations, children's clothing for those under 7 years old should not have any cords around the head and neck. Therefore, authentic children's clothing does not have a hood, elastic cords, etc. The cuffs of kids' jackets do not have Velcro, only elastic for windproofing.

The North Face long down jacket with grid pattern, made of original custom waterproof nylon fabric, filled with 90% white duck down. The jacket features a stylish grid design, a hidden adjustable hood with drawstring, a 2-way Vision front zipper, adjustable hem with zipper openings at the side seams, large embroidered logo on the chest. High-quality version available in sizes XS to XL.

The North Face baseball down jacket features a classic short pilot jacket silhouette, with a loose fit that looks handsome and sleek on the upper body. It has a baseball-style small stand-up collar, ribbed cuffs and hem for warmth and style. Available in sizes S-XL.

The North Face 96 Down Vest in yellow, available in sizes XS-XXL. Made with exclusive Japanese fabric that is waterproof, anti-pilling, and colorfast, with 24-thread count pressed woolen fabric. Inner lining made of 400D high-density fabric to prevent pilling and leakage. Filled with 80% white duck down, with a loftiness of 15.5, accompanied by testing reports. Features original YKK zipper, one chest pocket, and two side pockets designed to withstand 100,000 pulls. Embroidered with Japanese imported machine for meticulous craftsmanship. Unisex design. Sizes available: XS-XXL.
